_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of both cloud computing and how it is applied in a variety of industries.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of cloud data platform infrastructure services, including managed compute, serverless processing, object storage, data warehouse, and streaming platform options across major cloud providers.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-021 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-015 (AI, cosine: 0.688), TF-K-005 (TF, cosine: 0.661).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.652). Shared vocabulary: [cloud, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [applied, computing, industries, variety] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, compute, data, infrastructure, major, managed] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.895, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of both cloud computing and how it is applied in a variety of industri" and "Knowledge of cloud data platform infrastructure services, including managed comp" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.689 ≈ STS 0.652 (gap 0.037). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [cloud, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [cloud, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [applied, computing, industries, variety]. WIDAI-only: [across, compute, data, infrastructure, major, managed].
